title: Pouzolzia peteri
taxonomy: Pouzolzia peteri is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. It is native to tropical Africa. The plant is classified as a member of the genus Pouzolzia, which is a group of plants closely related to the nettle family. Pouzolzia peteri is a perennial herb that grows in a variety of environments, from forests to grasslands. The classification of Pouzolzia peteri is further supported by its morphological characteristics, such as its leaves and inflorescences, which are typical of the Urticaceae family.
